meta.title: Chihuahuas for Grandma
meta.subtitle: Hand-picked adoptable dogs — cuddly lap companions around 5–6 lbs when possible.

targetWeightLbs.note: Rough guide; confirm with the shelter or foster.

dogs.name: Bella (example)
dogs.personality: Sweet, calm, loves to follow you room to room. Enjoys quiet evenings and soft blankets.
dogs.lapDogNote: Foster says she seeks out laps and sleeps under the covers.
dogs.summary: Gentle girl who wants to be held and nap beside you.
dogs.details:
Replace this card with a real dog. Paste the shelter’s description here so Grandma can read it in one place.

The match score blends weight, cuddly cues, and gentle penalties if the write-up sounds very high-energy.
dogs.adoptionProcess: Example: $150 adoption fee; meet-and-greet required; home check within 20 miles. (Replace with text from the real listing.)

dogs.name: Sparky (example — spunky)
dogs.personality: Spunky and playful — lots of energy, loves toys, wants to run and play fetch. Not a lap potato.
dogs.summary: Fun little guy — better for someone who wants an active buddy.
dogs.details: This example shows how a more energetic personality still appears clearly, and the match score tends to be lower for lap-focused goals. Weight is missing on purpose to show the “not listed” message.
